recipes.title: Spaghetti Bolognese
recipes.description: Classic Italian pasta dish with rich meat sauce, tomatoes, and aromatic herbs. Perfect comfort food that's hearty and satisfying.
recipes.author: Maria Rossi

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
recipes.description: Simple yet delicious breakfast featuring mashed avocado on toasted bread, topped with olive oil, lemon juice, and red pepper flakes.
recipes.author: Chef Jordan

recipes.title: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Tender chunks of marinated chicken in a creamy, spiced tomato-based sauce. A beloved Indian-inspired dish with aromatic spices and herbs.
recipes.author: Priya Sharma

recipes.title: Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with creamy Caesar dressing, parmesan cheese, and crunchy croutons. A timeless classic that's refreshing and flavorful.
recipes.author: Chef Michael
